creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
top(1) shows the free swap space value using kvm_getswapinfo(3),

However, kvm_getswapinfo isn't easily available to languages other than C/C++, like Golang.

Since sysctl already exposes the total swap size as vm.swap_total, it would be logical to also also have vm.swap_free sysctl variable.

Every time some swap segment usage count would change, or the set of swap segments itself would change, the corresponding in-memory variable would be increased or decreased.
